name: Spiced Vanilla
description: Spice Vanilla is a bold, spiced take on our signature vanilla gourmand. Opening with sweet cake and cinnamon, it melts into rich vanilla, cardamom, caramel and nutty notes, before settling into a warm, woody base. Delicious, cosy and long-lasting, it’s made for summer nights when you want to stand out and leave a lasting impression.

name: Island Water
description: A fresh light fragrance with notes of melon, aqua, saltwater and hints of musk towards the end. This is an all out blue, mild, aqua fragrance which adds an uplifting sea breeze quality. Dive into the freshness with the succulent aroma of melon and embrace the zest of grapefruit and the sea's aromatic essence.

name: Customise 2 x
description: A fragrance duo curated for gifting, made to feel personal. With your choice of two 50 ml perfumes, this set lets you craft a gift that suits different moods and moments. A beautifully personal way to share fragrances they’ll reach for every day.

name: London Bar & Vanilla Wood—Pair & Layer
description: London Bar: London Bar embodies the spirit of London's elegant nightlife, capturing the essence of a dimly lit bar where spiced rum mingles with the aroma of a lit cigar. This fragrance is your ticket to a world of refined indulgence and intrigue, an olfactory journey that's smoky, boozy, spicy, woody and perfect for those unforgettable nights. Vanilla Wood: It's not your typical sweet vanilla perfume. Vanilla Wood opens with hints of vanilla bean and Irish cream liqueur and finishes with woo...

name: Vanilla Wood & Spice Wood—Pair & Layer
description: Vanilla Wood: It's not your typical sweet vanilla perfume. Vanilla Wood opens with hints of vanilla bean and Irish cream liqueur and finishes with woody notes of amber and sandalwood in the base. In the middle notes, you find floral accents of may rose and jasmine. Vanilla Wood strikes a perfect balance between warmth and strength, making it an ideal choice for anyone seeking a unique, gender-neutral fragrance. Spice Wood: Rich, complex, and genderless, this is a typical strong noir fragrance...

name: Spiced Vanilla
description: A richer, spiced twist in our bestselling vanilla-forward gourmand lineup. Say hello to the boldest member of our vanilla universe. Building on the love for Baked Vanilla , Vanilla Wood and Drunken Cake , this fragrance brings depth, spice and indulgence that shines long after sunsets. It’s delicious, cosy, and wearable. It opens with the comforting sweetness of cake and a sprinkle of cinnamon. The heart melts into cardamom, warm vanilla, nutty notes, and caramel, creating a rich, boozy centr...

name: Lavender Tease
description: A little chic, a little playful. There's a power in tease, and Lavender Tease knows it. It's built around the beauty of fresh lavender, iris and pink lily. Soft, delicate and light enough to feel effortless, interesting enough to keep people curious. The base of musk and cedarwood is where the flirt really lives, adding a gentle warmth that balances all that delicacy. It’s the kind of fragrance a chic woman would choose–effortlessly graceful, subtly seductive, and unforgettable without trying...

name: Royal Santal - South
description: Royal Santal opens with the creamy richness of sandalwood, lifted by the golden sweetness of dates and a subtle hint of first rain. At its heart, vetiver and star anise bring earthy depth and delicate spice, before settling into a regal base of oud, amber, patchouli, and layered sandalwood. From brides adorned with sandalwood paste to the intricate carvings of Mysore artisans, and its role as the crown jewel of global perfumery, this fragrance celebrates sandalwood as South India’s timeless t...

name: Royal Saffron - North
description: Royal Saffron glows with the radiance of 'red gold', the legendary saffron of the North once reserved for emperors. The fragrance opens with the brilliance of saffron and honey, flowing into velvety rose petals at its heart. Oud and deep woody notes form a regal base, leaving behind a trail of opulence and timeless warmth. This is the grandeur of North India captured in fragrance: luxurious, radiant, and majestic.

name: Royal Gardens - West
description: Royal Gardens captures the beauty of palatial gardens and forts of West India. These are places where fruit, flowers, and fort walls meet in timeless elegance. Platters of guava once served in royal durbars and the serenity of lotus lead the way. At its heart bloom tuberose, mogra, Indian jasmine, and orange blossom; florals that adorned palace courtyards. Anchored by the softness of white musk, the fragrance lingers with radiant grace and quiet beauty.

name: Royal Amber - East
description: Royal Amber is bold, strong, and commanding. The warmth of spice blends seamlessly with the depth of woods, balanced by amber’s golden glow and vetiver’s earthy calm. It’s a fragrance that feels timeless and powerful, that truly roars with the strength of the Tiger from the East of India.

name: Sinful Rose
description: The rose you weren’t ready for. Sinful Rose is a bold, seductive twist on the classic floral — made for nights that end long after midnight. It opens with the boldness of red rose, often mistaken for softness, but make no mistake, this isn’t delicate. As it unfolds, the sweetness turns heady and hypnotic, deepening into woody amber and warm musk that lingers like a memory etched into skin. It’s a fragrance that speaks volumes without ever raising its voice. Wear it when you want to turn heads...

name: Black Listed
description: Dark. Smoky. Irresistibly dangerous. Black Listed doesn’t ask for attention, it owns it. This is the fragrance of late-night whispers, sharp suits, and the thrill of not getting caught. Imagine a fragrance so slick, you could use it to trap an art thief at a royal museum — it lingers in the air long after you’ve left, leaving behind more questions than answers. Built on a base of oud, dry woods and hints of leather, Black Listed wraps around your skin like shadow and smoke — mysterious, mascu...

name: Not Just Mango
description: Juicy, creamy, and just a little cheeky. Not Just Mango is a pulpy, mouth-watering escape to an Indian summer — where mango season rules and every moment feels sun-kissed and carefree. Imagine the fragrance of ripe, golden mangoes — sweet, juicy, and dripping with nostalgia, finished with a fruity, floral and creamy twist. This isn’t just another fruity fragrance — it’s a joyful, flirty celebration of mango in all its messy, delicious glory.

name: Pineapple Club
description: Welcome to the Pineapple Club — where island time begins. Step into the rhythm of Hawaii, where the air smells like fruit stands by the beach and the breeze carries the echo of carefree dancing and hula laughter. Pineapple Club isn’t just a fragrance, it’s a state of mind. You smell a splash of juicy pineapple, crisp green apple and tropical florals with every spray. There’s a playful energy in the air — carefree, joyful, and full of bright colours.

name: Juicy Melon
description: Juicy Melon is summer bottled — that first bite of chilled musk melon on a hot afternoon, sweet juice trickling down your chin as you laugh under the sun. This fragrance doesn’t just smell like melons, it feels like them. Cold. Juicy. Lush. With every spray, you’re surrounded by the playful joy of honeydew, watermelon, and pear — balanced with a soft, clean musk that lingers on your skin like sunlight after a swim. It’s bright. It’s breezy. And it’s made for days when you want to feel young, ...

topNotes: balanced by the depth of musk

description: Wild Escape is your ticket to a refreshing and rejuvenating experience. Its top notes of bergamot and lemon peel, balanced by the depth of musk and cedarwood, are perfect for the wild adventurer within you. The crisp citrus kick keeps you energised. Whether you're hitting the gym, powering through a workday, or embracing the outdoors, Wild Escape ensures you stay effortlessly fresh and confident. Escape into the wild with Wild Escape.

name: Berry Addiction
description: Juicy, electric, and just a little wild. Berry Addiction feels like the thrill of popping fresh berries in your mouth — sharp, sweet, and slightly wicked. It opens with the irresistible burst of raspberry and strawberry, as if you just crushed them between your fingers. Then, an unexpected sparkle of orange zest lifts the scent like champagne fizz, while a hint of sugarcane adds playful softness. It is flirty, bright, and impossible not to notice.

description: A little boozy, a lot delicious. Drunken Cake is your ticket to dessert heaven. Think of a slice of rich tiramisu, soaked in dark rum and Irish cream, with layers of chocolate and cold coffee coming through in every bite... or in this case, every spritz. One whiff and you're transported to a cosy café on a rainy afternoon or the sweet ending of a candlelit dinner in Italy. Whether you're headed to brunch, a coffee date, or a girls’ night in, this is the finishing touch your moment needs.

It’s the kind of fragrance that makes you feel effortlessly beautiful and fresh all day long.

description: A masterful blend that embodies the sophisticated spirit of nightfall, Night Voyage is an exceptional fragrance that commands attention. It opens with fresh citrus, green, and spicy notes, reminiscent of the refreshing shower before a night out. The dry down is musky and woody that adds just the right amount of mystery to this fragrance. Night Voyage is perfect for the confident man who appreciates elegance with an edge, capturing the thrill of life's boldest moments.

As you settle deeper, notes of sweet cinnamon, smooth tonka bean, and aged oak wrap around you, evoking the well-worn elegance of leather armchairs and quiet conversations. Finally, a base of creamy vanill...

The nostalgia takes you right to the feeling of getting up early and feeling crisp for your big day at work, just smelling smooth and feeling energetic. A fragrance of fresh cut grass and lemony notes mixed with hints of spicy cedar wood and sage, this fragrance perfectly balances tradition and modernity, leaving you refreshed and confident all day long. It is the perfect masculine fragrance that lingers for a good while just like the ...

description: Indulge in a warm embrace of Baked Vanilla, a deeper, richer, more intense vanilla perfume blended like a sugary cupcake treat. It’s sweet, warm and comforting like a freshly baked cake. This delightful perfume opens with the notes of maple syrup and vanilla bean. The smell of crème brûlée hits off - that creamy, custardy goodness topped with caramelized sugar. Perfect for a cosy third date or a relaxing brunch, Baked Vanilla brings warmth and comfort, making every occasion feel special and i...

name: Apple Lily
description: From the essence of fresh and citrusy notes of green apple, Apple Lily is the most elegant and romantic perfume having a delicate fusion of green apple and soft lily. This vibrant fragrance is your perfect companion for daytime adventures. Unlike heavy floral notes, this interpretation of lily is light and airy, that’s both fresh and modern, perfect for today's woman on the go. Enhance your weekend brunch, complementing mimosas and laughter with its sparkling notes.

Devil’s Berry is your ideal companion for those pivotal moments when first impressions matter most. It is the perfect "finishing touch" to any first date outfit...

name: Alpha Spade

Perfect for nightlife, this fragrance is designed to make heads turn at nightclubs. It is ideal for men looking to give off charm and confidence, embracing the alpha within.

middleNotes: you find floral accents of may rose

Vanilla Wood strikes a perfect balance between warmth and strength, making it an ideal choice for anyone seeking a unique, gender-neutral fragrance. Prefer something extra sweet? Try Baked Vanilla.

name: Spice Wood
description: Rich, complex, and genderless, this is a typical strong noir fragrance. The combination of warm spices, sweet gourmand notes, and rich woody undertones creates a fragrance that exudes elegance and a mature sophistication that is equally at home on all individuals. It is a gourmand treasure.

name: La Fleur
description: La Fleur which means “The Flower” is a fragrance that instantly takes you to a radiant summer day and makes you want to freely sway under the sun. The zesty mandarin peel blends with the floral notes of refreshing orange blossom and lavender that feels timeless. This perfume is like a bouquet of rich soothing florals infused with energising citrusy accords.

name: Citrus Amber
description: Citrus Amber is crafted for those who love freshness with depth. It opens with a radiant burst of grapefruit and lime–bright, zesty, and full of energy. As it settles, the earthy touch of vetiver blends with the warmth of amber, creating a balance of crisp lightness and sophistication. It carries an air of freshness and elegance that feels effortless on anyone.

name: Beach Holiday
topNotes: peaches make this perfume smell like a tropical cocktail
description: Beach Holiday is a fresh, fruity and floral fragrance. Top notes of passionfruit, grapefruit, raspberry and peaches make this perfume smell like a tropical cocktail. Beach Holiday is perfect for a spritz of freshness on a hot summer day. It will instantly uplift your mood and transport you to the happy feeling of being on a vacation by the beach.

The sensuality of the Bulgarian rose in the top note merges with the freshness of the orange blossom in the heart note. This alluring combination is then made complete with agarwood’s grandeur, amber’s warmth, with undertones of patchouli.

name: Gin & Ocean Whisper Duo
description: "Inspired by seaside escapes and sparkling moments, Gin opens crisp and uplifting, while Ocean Whisper settles light and soothing. Together, they create a breezy scent story that feels modern, relaxed, and refined — perfect for everyday wear or thoughtful gifting. Wear them individually or layer to create a scent that evolves with your mood — bright and energising, or soft and tranquil."

name: Whiskey & Smoky Oud Duo
description: "Inspired by dimly lit lounges and slow, lingering evenings, Whiskey opens smooth and full-bodied, while Smoky Oud settles dark and resinous. Together, they create a bold scent story that feels luxurious and mysterious — perfect for evening wear or statement gifting. Wear them individually or layer to create a scent that evolves with your mood — warm and smooth, or deep and smoky."

name: Brandy & Vanilla Oud Duo
description: Inspired by slow evenings and intimate moments, Brandy opens smooth and inviting, while Vanilla Oud settles deep and sensual. Together, they create a layered scent story that feels cozy yet refined — perfect for gifting or discovering your signature warmth. Wear them individually or layer to create a scent that evolves with your mood — soft and creamy, or bold and woody."

name: Tequila & Ocean Whisper Duo
description: Inspired by coastal getaways and carefree moments, Tequila opens bright and invigorating, while Ocean Whisper settles soft and calming. Together, they create a light, breezy scent story that feels effortlessly fresh and refined — perfect for everyday wear or thoughtful gifting. Wear them individually or layer to create a scent that evolves with your mood — crisp and lively, or smooth and serene.

name: Jager EDP Unisex Perfume – Sweet & Spicy Gourmand Fragrance
description: Jager is a bold fragrance , addictive eau de parfum (EDP) for those who enjoy sweet highs with a spicy, warm edge. This strong, long-lasting unisex tobacco fragrance perfume opens with rich spice and depth, unfolding into smooth vanilla and cacao, grounded by warm woods and amber. Confident and energetic, it’s a powerful night perfume for men and women fragrance that lingers and leaves a lasting impression.

name: Rum & Cigar EDP Perfume for Men l Dark, Rich & Bold
description: Rum and Cigar is a strong, long-lasting eau de parfum (EDP) for those who love bold, rich rum fragrance . This premium unisex perfume blends dark rum and tobacco with warm woods, settling into vanilla, sandalwood, and amber for a deep, confident trail of a warm perfume by the fireplace. Perfect as an evening or night perfume, it’s a luxury fragrance for men and women that leaves a lasting impression.

name: Perfume Shot Trial Pack by Rivona (Set of 5 perfumes)
description: Discover five bold and intoxicating scents from our Nashedi Range in this Perfume Shot Trial Pack. With 5ml minis of each fragrance, it’s the perfect way to try before you buy. Pocket-friendly, travel-ready, and crafted for every mood—carry your vibe wherever you go.

name: Single Malt Whiskey Smoke  Perfume
description: Single Malt Whiskey Fragrance bottled by Rivona captures old-money, bold and traditional energy. This Eau de Parfum features a blend of whiskey, cinnamon and smoky tobacco a perfect note to a whiskey smoke perfume for that sit down, talk shop individual that you are, and it perfectly captures the earthy mood, evoking the essence of a woody perfume. A unisex fragrance crafted for those who appreciate depth, warmth, and presence.

name: Brandy Perfume –  Rich Perfume
description: Brandy Perfume bottled by Rivona wraps you in warmth and sweetness, like a comforting sip of brandy when you are sick. With its cozy woody notes and a hint of healing charm with berries and vanilla perfumes, it’s the perfect fragrance for moments when you crave comfort, capturing the warm mood effortlessly.

name: Scotch Perfume
description: Inspired by the richness of scotch, this Rivona Scotch perfume is crafted for individuals who value craftsmanship and sophistication. It’s a spicy perfume that resonates with character and distinction, capturing the bold undertones and woody depths often found in an amber perfume. A unisex fragrance for those who wear strength and elegance in equal measure.

name: Tequila Perfume – Zesty, Citrus & Mild Fragrance
description: Tequila Perfume bottled by Rivona is for those who live a life full of energy and excitement. Just like a night out with friends, it’s one of those fresh perfumes that’s fun and full of youthful spirit. Perfect for those who love to kick off the party with energy. Lime, Hibiscus, and Tequila come together for a bold, tropical twist capturing the fresh mood in every spritz.

name: Extra Dry Gin Perfume
description: Gin Perfume bottled by Rivona is for those who value versatility and a modern twist on tradition. Just like gin lovers who appreciate the blends, this fragrance is perfect for individuals with a bold yet sophisticated personality. With Grapefruit, Gin and Leather, it’s for those always ready to add a modern edge capturing the fruity and earthy mood. This scent complements lovers of whiskey smoke perfume and those drawn to the depth of a woody perfume making it a standout in the world of rich ...

name: Rivona Timeless Eau De Parfum - Everyday fragrance
description: Rivona Timeless Eau De Parfum For men and women is a powerful invitation of sophistication and timeless elegance. The blend of raspberry, rose and cedar is well suited to those individuals making their name in the business world or across a formal setting where a sense of grace, simplicity and maturity is desired.
